paragraphs.text: Hand-forged head, hickory handle, linseed finish.
Roomy carry, brass hardware, weather sealed.
High-spark rod, striker, jute tinder included.
Compact pack hatchet for trail and camp.
Sighted lid, luminous bezel, leather pouch.
Full-tang carbon steel, scandi grind blade.
Open-fire boiling pot with folding handle.
Tensioned blade, ash frame, leather sheath.
Six-hour burn, brass base, glass chimney.
Trifold canvas, clear PVC viewing window.
Slim profile head for accurate timber work.
Top-load canvas pack, leather straps, brass.
Double wall, stack rim, paracord handle.
Dual grit, leather pouch, blade guide.
Lidded 4L pot with tripod chain hook.
Heavy duck cloth, leather ties, hand-stitched.
Hand-selected outdoor and bushcraft goods, built for the Australian bush since 2009. Workshop based in Ballarat, Victoria.
